scripts.format: prettier --write . && cd tooling && uv run ruff format src tests ../apps/changelog/tooling ../semantic/lightdash/tooling
scripts.format:check: prettier --check . && cd tooling && uv run ruff format --check src tests ../apps/changelog/tooling ../semantic/lightdash/tooling
scripts.lint:python: cd tooling && uv run ruff check src tests ../apps/changelog/tooling ../semantic/lightdash/tooling
scripts.test: cd tooling && PYTHONPATH=src:../apps/changelog/tooling:../semantic/lightdash/tooling uv run pytest tests ../apps/changelog/tooling/tests ../semantic/lightdash/tooling/tests
scripts.typecheck: cd tooling && MYPYPATH=src:../apps/changelog/tooling:../semantic/lightdash/tooling uv run mypy src tests ../apps/changelog/tooling ../semantic/lightdash/tooling && pnpm --filter @point-of-rental/changelog-site typecheck
scripts.validate: pnpm format:check && pnpm markdown:lint && pnpm yaml:lint && pnpm lint:python && pnpm lightdash:validate-refs && pnpm lightdash:validate-shared && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm changelog:build
